titel: Municipal Council, Municipality of Norrtälje, October 20, 2025.
html: Kommunfullmäktige Kommunstyrelsen Diarienummer: KS 2025-3 Reg.datum: 2025-01-01 Utskriftsdatum: 2025-10-13 Tillkomst: In In/Ut-datum: 2025-01-01 Sekretess: Nej Rubrik: Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige Beskrivning: Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige Handläggare: Antonia Berglund Avdelning: Verksamhetskod: Ärendetyp: 2.4.1 Hantera och registrera allmänna handlingar Handlingsnr Tillkomst Reg.datum In/Ut datum Handl. typ Rubrik Initierare: Handlingar: KS 2025-3-22 Upprättad 2025-10-02 2025-10-02 Protokollsutdrag ¤ §144 KF Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige KS 2025-3-23 Upprättad 2025-10-02 2025-09-10 Övrig diarieförd handling 2.4.1 Meddelanden fr.o.m. 2025-06-01 t.o.m. 2025-09-10 KS 2025-3-24 In 2025-10-10 2025-10-10 Inkommen post för kännedom och information 2.4.1 Rapport 2025-10-08 från inspektion den 2 april av Överförmyndaren i Norrtälje kommun
tldr: The municipality of Norrtälje has received a report from the Public Guardian's Office regarding how they provide support to individuals who need assistance in managing their affairs.
lattlast:
The municipal council of Norrtälje has received a new report. The report comes from the Public Guardian, which is the authority responsible for ensuring that individuals who are unable to manage their own finances or legal affairs receive assistance.

The report is based on an inspection conducted in April 2025. The purpose of this work is to ensure that those who need support receive the correct help and that their rights are protected by the municipality.

This information has now been registered in the municipality's system so that management can be aware of how the work with these individuals is progressing.
